news.title:
Nifty India Defence index fell 5% amid market sell-off; HAL hit 52-week low at ₹3,510.
Defence stocks, including GRSE, BDL, and Mazagon Dock, plunged 6-8%; profit booking weighs.
news.summary:
Nifty India Defence index fell 5% amid market sell-off; HAL hit 52-week low at ₹3,510.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions, like the Iran-Israel conflict, boost Indian defence (HAL, BEL, BDL) and energy stocks (ONGC, Oil India).
Sector rotation favors defence, energy, and shipping companies amid rising crude prices and global uncertainty.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions, like the Iran-Israel conflict, boost Indian defence (HAL, BEL, BDL) and energy stocks (ONGC, Oil India).
Sector rotation favors defence, energy, and shipping companies amid rising crude prices and global uncertainty.

news.title:
Defence stocks face selling pressure despite strong order books and govt support; Nifty India Defence Index down 1.8%.
Short-term concerns include profit booking, supply chain issues, execution focus, but long-term prospects remain positive.
news.summary:
Defence stocks face selling pressure despite strong order books and govt support; Nifty India Defence Index down 1.8%.
Short-term concerns include profit booking, supply chain issues, execution focus, but long-term prospects remain positive.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal maintains 'Buy' on Bharat Dynamics with ₹1,800 target, citing increased global defense spending.
Middle East tensions boost India's defense exports; supply chain issues may impact execution timelines.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal maintains 'Buy' on Bharat Dynamics with ₹1,800 target, citing increased global defense spending.
Middle East tensions boost India's defense exports; supply chain issues may impact execution timelines.

news.title:
Defence stocks like HAL, BEL, BDL, and GRSE show stellar returns of up to 1750% over four years.
Experts view defence as India's new IT sector, driven by geopolitical tensions, govt push, and export growth.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like HAL, BEL, BDL, and GRSE show stellar returns of up to 1750% over four years.
Experts view defence as India's new IT sector, driven by geopolitical tensions, govt push, and export growth.

news.title:
Defence stocks show divergence; PSUs like HAL (-9% YTD) and BDL (-16% YTD) struggle, while private players like Data Patterns (+18% YTD) and Solar Industries (+10% YTD) gain.
Nifty Defence Index gains 4.8% YTD. Analysts highlight elevated valuations, execution challenges, and policy gaps as key factors affecting PSU stocks, favoring private players.
news.summary:
Defence stocks show divergence; PSUs like HAL (-9% YTD) and BDL (-16% YTD) struggle, while private players like Data Patterns (+18% YTD) and Solar Industries (+10% YTD) gain.
Nifty Defence Index gains 4.8% YTD. Analysts highlight elevated valuations, execution challenges, and policy gaps as key factors affecting PSU stocks, favoring private players.

news.title:
Defence stocks like BEL, BDL, HAL rallied amid PM Modi's Israel visit, driven by joint venture potential and tech partnerships.
Astra Microwave surged 5.7%, while BEL, BDL, and HAL rose 2-3%. India's defence exports hit ₹23,000 crore; FY25 production at ₹1.5 lakh crore.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like BEL, BDL, HAL rallied amid PM Modi's Israel visit, driven by joint venture potential and tech partnerships.
Astra Microwave surged 5.7%, while BEL, BDL, and HAL rose 2-3%. India's defence exports hit ₹23,000 crore; FY25 production at ₹1.5 lakh crore.

news.title:
Bharat Dynamics Ltd is raising its dividend to ₹4.50, a 13% increase from last year's ₹4.00.
EPS is set to grow by 153.3%, ensuring a sustainable payout ratio of 13% next year.
news.summary:
Bharat Dynamics Ltd is raising its dividend to ₹4.50, a 13% increase from last year's ₹4.00.
EPS is set to grow by 153.3%, ensuring a sustainable payout ratio of 13% next year.

news.title:
Bharat Dynamics Q3 EBITDA drops to 260M rupees from 1.3B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 4.6% from 15.3% YoY.
news.summary:
Bharat Dynamics Q3 EBITDA drops to 260M rupees from 1.3B YoY.
EBITDA margin declined to 4.6% from 15.3% YoY.

news.title:
Bharat Dynamics Ltd's board approved an interim dividend of Rs 4.5/share for FY 2025-26, with a record date set for February 9, 2026.
Unaudited Q3 FY 2025-26 revenue stood at Rs 5,666.3 crore, with a net profit of Rs 72.9 crore, as per the company's financial results.
news.summary:
Bharat Dynamics Ltd's board approved an interim dividend of Rs 4.5/share for FY 2025-26, with a record date set for February 9, 2026.
Unaudited Q3 FY 2025-26 revenue stood at Rs 5,666.3 crore, with a net profit of Rs 72.9 crore, as per the company's financial results.

news.title:
Sun Pharma, GAIL India, IDFC First Bank, Birla Corporation, and others to announce Q3 results today, 31st Jan.
Companies like Bharat Dynamics, Delhivery, and Zen Technologies are also set to release Q3 financials.
news.summary:
Sun Pharma, GAIL India, IDFC First Bank, Birla Corporation, and others to announce Q3 results today, 31st Jan.
Companies like Bharat Dynamics, Delhivery, and Zen Technologies are also set to release Q3 financials.

news.title:
Bharat Dynamics' board to meet on 31st Jan 2026 to approve Q3 FY26 results and consider interim dividend.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan 2026 until 48 hours post-results declaration per insider trading rules.
news.summary:
Bharat Dynamics' board to meet on 31st Jan 2026 to approve Q3 FY26 results and consider interim dividend.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan 2026 until 48 hours post-results declaration per insider trading rules.

news.title:
Bharat Dynamics' EPS grew 18% YoY, from 15.1 to 17.9, despite lower EBIT margins.
CEO's compensation of 8.2m is well below industry median, aligning with shareholder interests.
news.summary:

news.title:
Capital goods sector depends on govt orders and overseas business as private sector investment remains flat.
Public sector allocations in FY27 Budget are unlikely to see significant increases.

news.title:
India completes user trials of next-gen Akash missile, boosting defense capabilities.
Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL) plays a key role in advancing missile technology.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bharat Dynamics' (NSE:BDL) share price rose 741% over five years, with a 792% total shareholder return boosted by dividends.
The company's EPS grew 16% annually, outpaced by a 53% share price rise, reflecting market optimism and a high P/E ratio of 79.8.
news.summary:
Bharat Dynamics' (NSE:BDL) share price rose 741% over five years, with a 792% total shareholder return boosted by dividends.
The company's EPS grew 16% annually, outpaced by a 53% share price rise, reflecting market optimism and a high P/E ratio of 79.8.

news.title:
Putin's India visit for the 23rd India-Russia Annual Summit may drive focus on defence stocks like HAL, BEL, and BDL.
Talks on defence deals, tech transfer, S-400 systems, and Sukhoi jets could boost Indian defence PSUs and local manufacturing.
news.summary:
Putin's India visit for the 23rd India-Russia Annual Summit may drive focus on defence stocks like HAL, BEL, and BDL.
Talks on defence deals, tech transfer, S-400 systems, and Sukhoi jets could boost Indian defence PSUs and local manufacturing.

news.title: Goldman Sachs retains 'Sell' rating for Bharat Dynamics, sets Rs 1375 target.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs retains 'Sell' rating for Bharat Dynamics, sets Rs 1375 target.

news.title:
Reliance Industries completed the merger of Star TV Productions with Jiostar. Bank of Maharashtra's OFS opens Dec 2 at Rs 54/share.
IRB Infra sells a project to IRB InvIT for Rs 513 crore. Bharat Dynamics secures Rs 2461.6 crore orders from the Indian Army.
news.summary:
Reliance Industries completed the merger of Star TV Productions with Jiostar. Bank of Maharashtra's OFS opens Dec 2 at Rs 54/share.
IRB Infra sells a project to IRB InvIT for Rs 513 crore. Bharat Dynamics secures Rs 2461.6 crore orders from the Indian Army.

news.title: Bharat Dynamics secures new orders worth ₹24.6 billion, indicating robust demand.
